prompt: A dramatic Japanese fantasy action RPG key art designed like a PlayStation 5 game cover poster. Vertical composition, ultra-detailed, high-contrast, cinematic dark fantasy. In the background, count 2 enormous black-purple dragons: one dominant dragon on the upper right with mouth wide open, glowing orange fire in its throat, jagged obsidian scales, and blazing eyes; one second dragon silhouette on the upper left with wings spread across the sky. Full moon in the center-top sky, purple nebula clouds, embers, ash, magical sparks, and a ruined gothic castle city on the right background. In the foreground, count 3 female elf warriors standing in a heroic triangular formation, all wearing ornate metallic armor with glossy magenta, silver, and violet tones. Center character: blonde elf princess-warrior, short to medium hair, small crown or jeweled tiara, white fur mantle over shoulders, polished silver armor exposing midriff, black gloves, confident battle stance, wielding a gigantic double-bladed ceremonial axe with intricate filigree, turquoise crystal core, and engraved silver-blue blades. Left character: taller elf archer-warrior with long light brown hair, pointed ears, elaborate rose-magenta armor, large curved fantasy sword in her right hand, and a quiver of pink-fletched arrows on her back. Right character: long dark magenta-haired elf swordswoman with floral hair ornaments, violet-magenta armor, black cape, holding a slender sword angled downward. The image should feel like premium box art for an original game titled ECLIPSE SAGA. Include visible game-package typography and branding elements: top left white PS5 logo; top right small bracketed studio tag [O-prompt laboratory]; large vertical Japanese slogan on the right side; count 2 lines of Japanese promotional copy on the upper left; the main title in huge glowing gold serif letters across the bottom center reading ECLIPSE SAGA; a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it; bottom left CERO C rating badge; bottom center count 3 short Japanese feature blurbs separated by diamond icons; bottom right OPL logo. Use a lavish painted-anime-meets-hyperreal style, dense detail, polished reflections, fiery rim light, purple and orange color contrast, and the overall feel of a mature-rated epic console fantasy adventure cover.
